scores.notes: The OCR output has several issues: text accuracy is compromised by numerous misspellings and missing words (e.g., 'GR&DCRESEARCHPR0GRAMME&RES0URCEALL0CATI0N1984-1986'). The table structure is partially preserved but lacks clarity in the distribution list. Numeric precision is relatively high except for the date format. Layout preservation is poor as sections and formatting are not maintained. Completeness is lacking as key details like the document type and insights are missing.
